response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: No reference lyrics were provided in the reference JSON. 2. Humming or minor singing moments were included for completeness.

subtitles.original: I'm gonna make some pie with the leftovers.
subtitles.english: I'm gonna make some pie with the leftovers.

subtitles.original: Thank you, chickens. Ah! Let me out!
subtitles.english: Thank you, chickens. Ah! Let me out!

subtitles.original: And fill this all with pumpkins.
subtitles.english: And fill this all with pumpkins.

subtitles.original: I wonder if I should make a whole bunch of...
subtitles.english: I wonder if I should make a whole bunch of...

subtitles.original: No, not right now. Pumpkins will wait.
subtitles.english: No, not right now. Pumpkins will wait.

subtitles.original: I spent enough time. Put away the fishing rod for now.
subtitles.english: I spent enough time. Put away the fishing rod for now.

subtitles.original: And just fill tons and tons with pumpkins.
subtitles.english: And just fill tons and tons with pumpkins.

subtitles.original: I can become the Pumpking. Hehehe.
subtitles.english: I can become the Pumpking. Hehehe.

subtitles.original: I have left the recipe of... the pumpkin pie recipe...
subtitles.english: I have left the recipe of... the pumpkin pie recipe...

subtitles.original: ...passed to generations on... that farm. Go seek it.
subtitles.english: ...passed to generations on... that farm. Go seek it.

subtitles.original: And then I return to the beginning...
subtitles.english: And then I return to the beginning...

subtitles.original: Ooh, I already have almost 500k from just...
subtitles.english: Ooh, I already have almost 500k from just...

subtitles.original: What if I make the pumpkin field even bigger?
subtitles.english: What if I make the pumpkin field even bigger?

subtitles.original: Just find a bigger land. Hehehe.
subtitles.english: Just find a bigger land. Hehehe.

subtitles.original: But I want it to be kind of close so I don't have to like move to harvest.
subtitles.english: But I want it to be kind of close so I don't have to like move to harvest.

subtitles.original: Expand towards the sugarcane for more lines?
subtitles.english: Expand towards the sugarcane for more lines?

subtitles.original: We'll have to go get a new axe soon. And a hoe.
subtitles.english: We'll have to go get a new axe soon. And a hoe.

subtitles.original: I think I'm gonna make the diamond hoe cuz I don't think they sell the diamond hoe.
subtitles.english: I think I'm gonna make the diamond hoe cuz I don't think they sell the diamond hoe.
